prompt: Create a vertical fantasy background illustration in a dark romantic gothic style, viewed from a high stone balcony at night. The scene overlooks a vast illuminated castle city with many spires and warm window lights beneath a cloudy deep-blue sky and a bright full moon. In the left foreground place two massive weathered stone columns wrapped with ivy and vines, a black cloak or mantle draped over a chair or railing, and one glowing brass lantern on a wooden chest. Across the lower foreground place one aged parchment map spread on a dark wooden table, one ornate dagger with emerald accents lying diagonally across it, one black leather glove beside it, two rolled scrolls tied with cord, one small metal cup or inkwell near the balcony ledge, one decorative locked treasure chest on the right, and one potted flowering plant with white blossoms. Use warm candlelight in the foreground contrasting with cool moonlight over the distant city, creating a quiet protective mood. Add a short vertical Japanese message on the left column in elegant white serif calligraphy, arranged as two vertical text columns, reading 静かな刃は、君を守る。. Make the setting feel like a silent guardian's lookout over a royal capital, with an emerald-inlaid dagger as the visual focus, moonlit clouds, and gothic fantasy castle city. No characters are visible.
